# Tune Voice AI Agent

## Step 1: Prerequisites
- Azure CLI logged in
- Azure AI Speech, Azure OpenAI, Azure Communication Services, Azure Container Apps access

## Step 2: Execute
Adjust config/openai.json and config/guardrails.json.

## Step 3: Verify
Confirm results meet thresholds.
